name: Zomato AI Recommender
updateContentCommand: [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo xargs apt install -y <packages.txt; [ -f ai-restaurant-recommender/requirements.txt ] && pip3 install --user -r ai-restaurant-recommender/requirements.txt; [ -f frontend/package.json ] && cd frontend && npm install; echo '✅ Packages installed'
